unsafe_claims_top.label: deep production backend delivery in go
ownership of slos, incident response, and reliability engineering programs
direct mcp, openai, or anthropic platform experience if not documented
formal people management or direct hiring authority
claiming consumer-scale usage in the millions without that number on the cv
claiming production self-correcting agent memory across sessions if only partial rag work was done
claiming extensive typescript-first agent platform ownership if the work was primarily python
claiming people-management responsibility or hiring authority if the role is still an ic principal position
claiming company-wide ai developer tooling ownership at docker scale without matching adoption metrics
claiming direct experience with specific tools such as claude code, cursor, or warp if that was not part of the work
claiming hipaa or phi program ownership without healthcare delivery experience
claiming full multi-cloud bedrock plus vertex ai implementation if the work was only on one cloud or one provider

candidate_mapping_themes_top.label: lantern: llm gateway with multi-provider routing and circuit breaker maps to secure routing, resilience, and gateway-style product work.
commander-4: enterprise ai workflow platform with evaluation and guardrails maps to ai tooling, lifecycle safety, and developer-facing platform delivery.
microservices / rabbitmq plus cqrs / event-sourcing experience maps to distributed systems, service-oriented architecture, and backend platform design.
commander-4 maps directly to agent orchestration, rag, guardrails, and evaluation because it already shipped 42 plugins and 2000-user workflows.
lantern maps to reliability and model / tool routing because multi-provider routing and circuit breaking are the same failure modes this role needs to solve.
prior microservices and event-sourcing work supports the event-driven workflow design the jd asks for.
commander-4 shows you can build reusable ai platforms that multiple users and plugins share, which matches docker's self-service platform goal.
lantern shows routing, resilience, and abstraction across providers, useful for developer tools infrastructure.

specific_domain_years.label: 5+ years of hands-on delivery for enterprise cloud initiatives; 5+ years building or leading large-scale, mission-critical applications; 7+ years designing and developing modern microservices architectures and cost-effective apis; 7+ years managing stakeholder requirements
5+ years focused, hands-on work with large language models (llms), agentic ai, and generative ai systems
1+ years building production genai solutions in b2b saas environments
5+ years in ml / ai or big-data environments
